title: lewisia columbiana
intro: Lewisia columbiana, also known as the Columbia Lewisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Montiaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the western United States and southwestern Canada, known for its delicate white, pink, or purple flowers and attractive foliage. The medicinal properties of Lewisia columbiana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which have been used to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote skin health, with reported health benefits including improved wound healing and reduced risk of infection.
